title: Trump UFO Speech Claim Collapses as Alleged Insider Source Denies Contact, Exposing Explosive Leak as False
description: Explore how a sensational claim about a UFO disclosure speech involving Donald Trump was debunked, highlighting issues of credibility in the UFO research community.

title: Lawmaker demands probe into 'dark' pattern of deaths and unexplained disappearances of UFO research scientists
description: US Congressman Tim Burchett says 'something dark is going on...we’ve got to get to the bottom of it'

title: Calls for probe into 'dark' pattern of deaths and disappearances of UFO researchers
description: US Congressman Tim Burchett says 'something dark is going on...we’ve got to get to the bottom of it' after a string of unexplained disappearances of several UFO scientists

title: Japan Lawmakers Plan to Propose Establishing Specialized UFO Department to Government
description: A bipartisan group of Japanese lawmakers decided on Tuesday to propose establishing a specialized department to deal with unidentified flying objects (UFOs) to the government.
